page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: MEES607 or MEES698G.

Formerly: MEES698G.

MEES608 Seminar in Marine-Estuarine-Environmental Sciences (1-2 Credits)

MEES609 Professional Development in Marine Estuarine Environmental Science (1-3 Credits)

Training designed for existing and future careers.

Repeatable to: 20 credits if content differs.
